name: claude-translate
description: Token-saving RU→EN translation layer for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-translate
plugins.description: Save tokens on Cyrillic text: docs served as cached English translations on Read, assistant replies translated on display while the transcript stays English, CLAUDE.md kept in English from a Cyrillic source — via a cheap Haiku tier billed to your subscription. Metrics with real cost receipts, MCP translate/resolve_doc.
